chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – One dies and there is no inheritor for him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/255)
text: الْإِمَامُ وَارِثُ مَنْ لَا وَارِثَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1<sup>st</sup> having said: ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is the inheritor of the one who has no inheritor for him’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from certain persons of our people who has narrated the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Awwal, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Al-Imam is the heir of one who does not have any heirs.’”
